---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. E.g. "I have to write 200 lines of boilerplate every time I want to..."

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want energykit to do.

**Example API (ideal)**
```python
# Show what the ideal usage would look like
from energykit import ...
```

**Alternatives considered**
List any alternative solutions or packages you've tried.

**Context**
What is your use case? (utility, C&I, residential, research, etc.)
